data.title: Capital Economics: Trump's dismissal of Powell will shock the market, and the new chairman will not cut interest rates as expected
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Stephen Brown, deputy chief economist for North America at Capital Economics, pointed out in a report that the market reaction on Wednesday foreshadowed how investors might respond if Trump carried out his threat to fire Fed Chairman Powell. Brown said that the dollar, stocks and short-term bond yields may fall, and long-term yields may soar. Trump has refuted reports that he tried to fire Powell, calling it "extremely unlikely." However, the new chairman of the Federal Reserve is likely to be announced long before Powell's term ends in May 2026. Brown emphasized that even if the chairman is replaced, it is extremely unlikely that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates by 300 basis points as Trump has called for. (Jinshi)

data.title: Matrixport: Technical indicators show that Bitcoin may enter a consolidation period in the next 1-2 months
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Matrixport released a research report stating that the price of Bitcoin is approaching the upward boundary, and technical indicators show that the market may enter a consolidation period in the next 1-2 months. RSI has broken through 70 and entered the overbought area, and multiple reversal signals have shown signs of falling back. The report recommends moderately locking in profits and points out that the $106,000-108,000 range is the key support level, and $122,000 is the next reasonable target. The US core CPI only rose slightly to 2.9%, which was lower than expected. The Federal Reserve may not directly cut interest rates in July, but may release an expectation management signal.

data.title: Significant BTC and ETH Options Expiry with Notable Put Call Ratios
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Greeks.live indicates that 41,000 Bitcoin options are set to expire today, with a Put Call Ratio of 0.78. The maximum pain point is $114,000, and the nominal value is $4.93 billion.

Additionally, 240,000 Ethereum options will also expire today, featuring a Put Call Ratio of 1.0. The maximum pain point for these options is $2,950, with a nominal value of $880 million.

data.title: Yi Lihua: UNI is the third largest currency we invest in, with huge certainty and potential
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Yi Lihua, founder of LD Capital, said in a post that BTC continues to reach new highs, ETH is sprinting to new highs, and UNI is still three times away from the new high. After the ETH trend is established, UNI, which is known as 3x Ethereum leverage, has huge certainty and potential. First, it is the leader of ETH and the largest DEX. Second, DeFi policies are favorable. If the fee switch proposal is passed, the token economic model will be greatly upgraded. Third, the entire UNI consensus and trend are very good among mainstream currencies. UNI is our third largest investment product. Trend Research once released a special research report when it was $6.
